label: Low (evidence-anchored, decision-meaningful)
description: Retains only priors with a named empirical or physical source. The per-level ECAV and STI scale-factor axes are dropped (per-subsystem axis kept) to remove the dual-axis multiplicative duplication flagged in the registry (S2-01/S2-02). Dirichlet concentrations are tightened. L3 trajectory priors use industry-consensus narrower spread. The initial-state Beta concentrations are doubled to reflect the empirical cross-checks against 2024 AFDC/EIA data.
diagnostic_changes_vs_medium: drop ECAV scale factors for L3/L4/L5 axis (set sigma=0)
drop STI scale factors for Basic/Semi/Highly axis (set sigma=0)
L3 growth-rate sigma x0.5 with narrower truncation
L3 2075 target triangular range tightened around modes
Beta kappa doubled for both initial-state priors

notes.design_principle: retain only evidence-anchored uncertainty; drop duplicative multiplicative axes; keep centres unchanged so deterministic trajectories are byte-identical to MEDIUM
notes.expected_band_width_vs_medium: approximately 40 to 55 percent of MEDIUM width on ATS Total Power p05-p95 under California baseline and 45 to 60 percent on Ohio baseline (qualitative; exact numbers require MC regeneration)
notes.paper_safe: yes; no change to centre values, so deterministic reported numbers in the manuscript are unchanged
